hyperedges.label: Claude Code Ecosystem
hyperedges.description: Multiple files document Claude Code across versions and contexts: CLI extension in Cursor, Web/iOS version, v2.0.74 with LSP integration, and security update with Opus 4.6. All are iterations of the same Anthropic developer tool.

hyperedges.label: Google AI Ecosystem
hyperedges.description: Google's interconnected AI products: Gemini models (2.5 Pro, 3 Pro, 3 Flash, Embedding 2), Antigravity IDE, Firebase Studio, Google Workspace integration, and Google Stitch. All leverage Gemini model family.

hyperedges.label: MCP and AI Agent Security
hyperedges.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) appears as a cross-cutting concern across multiple files: security foundations in Google Cloud, integration in Firebase Studio, and usage in Retriever AI. Agent identity and secure tool access are central themes.
